metadata.subject: Arts Education
metadata.description: Students develop personal artistic practice through exploration of mixed media, conceptual art, and individual artistic voice. This course emphasizes experimental approaches, personal expression, and sustained art-making.
metadata.general_description: A course focused on personal artistic practice, mixed media, and conceptual art development.

big_ideas.statement: Personal artistic practice develops through sustained exploration, experimentation, and reflection.
big_ideas.elaboration: Artists create meaningful work by developing bodies of work over time, engaging in continuous practice, and refining their artistic vision.

big_ideas.statement: Mixed media and diverse materials expand possibilities for artistic expression.
big_ideas.elaboration: Contemporary artists work across multiple media and materials, combining traditional and contemporary approaches to create innovative artistic work.

big_ideas.statement: Conceptual art emphasizes ideas and meanings over technical skill alone.
big_ideas.elaboration: Contemporary conceptual approaches prioritize artistic concepts, narratives, and meaning-making, using materials and techniques as vehicles for expression.

big_ideas.statement: Artistic practice is informed by cultural contexts, personal experience, and artistic traditions.
big_ideas.elaboration: Artists draw inspiration from diverse sources including their own identities, cultural backgrounds, historical traditions, and contemporary contexts.

competencies.raw: Develop personal artistic practice and sustained body of work
i_can_statements: I can create a sustained series of artworks exploring a consistent theme or concept
I can develop personal artistic interests and subjects
I can maintain a sketchbook or journal documenting my artistic development
I can build a coherent body of work showing artistic growth

competencies.raw: Explore mixed media and diverse artistic materials
i_can_statements: I can experiment with multiple media and materials in my work
I can combine different materials creatively and intentionally
I can understand properties of diverse materials and their possibilities
I can develop technical skills with various art media

competencies.raw: Develop conceptual art and idea-driven work
i_can_statements: I can develop meaningful artistic concepts and ideas
I can use art to explore and communicate complex ideas
I can create work where concept drives material and form choices
I can articulate the ideas and meanings behind my artwork

competencies.raw: Take risks and experiment in artistic practice
i_can_statements: I can try new techniques and materials without fear of failure
I can embrace experimentation as part of artistic development
I can learn from unsuccessful experiments
I can push beyond comfortable approaches in my art-making

competencies.raw: Analyze and interpret personal and peer artwork
i_can_statements: I can describe and analyze my own artworks for meaning and impact
I can interpret artworks and explain possible meanings
I can analyze how materials and techniques contribute to meaning
I can appreciate diverse artistic approaches and expressions

competencies.raw: Reflect on artistic development and personal growth
i_can_statements: I can identify my artistic strengths and areas for development
I can track changes in my artistic practice over time
I can reflect on how my ideas and interests shape my work
I can set meaningful artistic goals

competencies.raw: Connect personal artwork to broader artistic and cultural contexts
i_can_statements: I can understand how my work relates to art history and contemporary art
I can identify cultural and social influences on my artistic practice
I can place my work within broader artistic conversations
I can appreciate how personal and cultural identities inform art-making

competencies.raw: Develop critical thinking about artistic choices and alternatives
i_can_statements: I can evaluate different approaches to artistic problems
I can make informed artistic decisions with artistic reasoning
I can consider how different choices affect artistic outcomes
I can balance artistic intentions with practical possibilities

competencies.raw: Document and preserve artworks and artistic practice
i_can_statements: I can photograph and document my artworks professionally
I can maintain a portfolio of my work
I can organize and label my artistic creations
I can preserve documentation of my artistic development

competencies.raw: Share and present artwork to audiences
i_can_statements: I can display my work effectively in exhibitions or presentations
I can present my artwork and artistic vision to others
I can discuss my work confidently with diverse audiences
I can engage viewers with my artistic expression

competencies.raw: Write about art and artistic practice
i_can_statements: I can write artist statements explaining my work and vision
I can articulate my artistic process and intentions
I can analyze and write about artworks and art concepts
I can communicate effectively about art through writing

competencies.raw: Communicate through visual art and artistic expression
i_can_statements: I can express ideas and emotions through my artwork
I can use visual art to communicate messages and perspectives
I can create work that invites audience interpretation
I can develop my artistic voice and visual language

competencies.raw: Connect personal artistic practice to art history and traditions
i_can_statements: I can study artworks and artists that inspire my practice
I can understand historical and cultural art traditions
I can respectfully incorporate influences from diverse artistic traditions
I can place my work within broader artistic conversations and history

competencies.raw: Explore contemporary art and emerging artistic practices
i_can_statements: I can engage with contemporary artists and current art trends
I can explore experimental and innovative artistic approaches
I can adapt contemporary practices to my own work
I can develop work relevant to current artistic conversations

competencies.raw: Connect art-making to social, cultural, and personal meanings
i_can_statements: I can create work exploring personal identity and experience
I can address cultural and social themes in my art
I can use art to explore meaningful questions and concerns
I can contribute to artistic conversations about important issues

competencies.raw: Explore pathways in visual arts and art careers
i_can_statements: I can develop a professional portfolio of my work
I can explore art careers and pathways
I can network with artists and art communities
I can envision art-making as a lifelong practice or career

areas.name: Personal Artistic Practice and Development
topics: Developing artistic interests and visual interests

areas.name: Conceptual Art and Idea Development
topics: Narrative and storytelling in visual art
Art as communication of complex ideas

areas.name: Art History, Traditions, and Cultural Contexts
areas.raw: Art History, Traditions, and Cultural Contexts
topics: Study of artworks and artists across history
Art's role in culture, society, and identity
